_comment: Master MCP server list. install.sh copies this file to .mcp.json at the project root of any repo it's run inside, and the SessionStart hook drops it into $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR. Only REMOTE (http/sse) MCPs work in Claude Code web sandboxes — local stdio MCPs stay in a separate local-only config. claude.ai → Settings → Connectors does NOT inject into Claude Code sandboxes (verified April 2026).
